# Project Description
Jamie Element's project for the AI Copilot Hackathon.

## Project Guidelines
- Keep styling consistent across pages.
- Use descriptive, organized file and folder names.
- Before creating a new file type, check for an existing standards file in the GitHub Awesome Copilot instructions and add an appropriate `.github/instructions` file if needed.

## Documentation
- Log every prompt and response in `docs/prompt-log`.
- Include only relevant snippets and reasoning.
- Use filenames in the form `YYYY-MM-DD-HH-MM-description.md`.
- Update the log when amending files.
